name: Mullvad
tagline: Swedish VPN with no accounts, no tracking, and a flat €5/month price — privacy purism

tiers.name: Flat rate
tiers.notes: €5/month — same price whether you buy 1 month or 1 year, paid month-to-month

pros: No email, no account — you get a random 16-digit account number at signup
Accepts anonymous cash payments (mail cash in an envelope), Monero, Bitcoin
Flat €5/month — no multi-year lock-in, never changes
Independently audited no-logs by Cure53 and Assured (2020, 2022, 2023)
Fully open-source apps + server infrastructure (RAM-only since 2023)
Swedish-based but EU-GDPR compliant; warrant-canary on every status page
Best-in-class privacy reputation among infosec communities
cons: Only 700 servers in 38 countries — significantly fewer than competitors
Does NOT unblock Netflix / Disney+ / BBC iPlayer reliably (privacy > streaming)
No free plan or trial (30-day money-back guarantee)
Limited customer support — email-only, no live chat

affiliate.commission_rate: Mullvad does NOT run an affiliate program
